_ai: AI fills this. Derived from: non-functional-requirements.json + architecture.json + infrastructure.json. Do not edit manually.

observability.stack: Grafana LGTM (Loki + Grafana + Tempo + Mimir) — self-hosted on Amazon ECS

metrics.collection: Prometheus scrape via OpenTelemetry SDK in each Spring Boot service (Micrometer bridge)
metrics.retention: 13 months at full resolution; compacted to 1h resolution after 90 days

logs.collection: Structured JSON logs from all ECS tasks via AWS CloudWatch Logs → Loki promtail
logs.retention: 90 days hot; archived to S3 Glacier after 90 days

traces.collection: OpenTelemetry SDK in all services; traces propagated via W3C Trace Context headers (correlation_id maps to traceId)
traces.samplingStrategy: 100% for booking saga and cancellation saga; 10% for read endpoints

dashboards: SLO Overview — booking saga p95, availability p95, dashboard p95, error rate
DLQ Monitor — queue depth by service, time in DLQ, resolution rate
Booking Funnel — requested → confirmed → completed conversion rates
Per-Tenant Performance — latency and error rates filterable by tenant_id
Tenant Isolation Monitor — isolation probe results, violation count
Notification Delivery — delivery rates by channel, retry exhaustion count
Infrastructure Health — ECS task count, RDS connections, Redis hit ratio, SQS throughput

slis.name: Booking Saga Latency
slis.description: End-to-end duration of the booking confirmation saga from request received to appointment.confirmed event written

slis.name: Booking Service Availability
slis.description: Proportion of booking API requests returning a non-5xx response over a 30-day window

slis.name: Availability Query Latency
slis.description: p95 response time for slot availability queries at the availability-service

slis.name: Dashboard Response Latency
slis.description: p95 response time for dashboard view queries served from the materialized view

slis.name: Dashboard Event Lag
slis.description: Time between appointment event written and DashboardView updated — target < 5 seconds

slis.name: DLQ Depth
slis.description: Number of unresolved entries in any service's dead letter queue

slos.name: Booking Saga p95 Latency
slos.errorBudget: 2% of requests may exceed 3s over 30 days
slos.alertingThreshold: Burn rate > 2x over 1 hour triggers page

slos.name: Booking Service Availability
slos.alertingThreshold: Error rate > 1% over 5 minutes triggers page

slos.name: Availability Query p95 Latency
slos.errorBudget: 2% of availability queries may exceed 500ms over 30 days

slos.name: Dashboard Response p95 Latency
slos.errorBudget: 2% of dashboard requests may exceed 200ms over 30 days

alerts.name: DLQ Depth Non-Zero
alerts.notes: Resolution SLA is 4 hours (NFR016). Alert must fire within 5 minutes of DLQ entry (FR010).

alerts.name: Tenant Isolation Violation Detected
alerts.notes: Zero-tolerance. Any detection triggers immediate incident. Monitor runs every 5 minutes (NFR012).

alerts.name: Tenant Booking Velocity Spike
alerts.condition: analytics.velocity_spike_detected event received (>3x 5-min average for a tenant)

alerts.name: Tenant Cancellation Rate Alert
alerts.condition: analytics.cancellation_rate_alert event received (>30% over last 50 bookings for a tenant)

alerts.name: Notification Delivery DLQ Routed
alerts.notes: Delivery failure never blocks booking (BR007). Alert is informational for ops awareness.
